$note: Canonical third-party review platform URLs for JVTO. Direct scraping blocked by anti-bot on all platforms — use official APIs for ingest.

trustpilot.api_notes: Trustpilot Business API — requires owner OAuth + paid tier

tripadvisor.api_notes: TripAdvisor Content API — partner program application required

google_maps.api_notes: Google Places API — public API key, includes up to 5 reviews per call. For full set use Google Business Profile API (owner-auth)

facebook.api_notes: Facebook Graph API — requires page access token

db_canonical_path: jvto_dev.reviews table — already populated with ~10 verified rows. API endpoint: /api/reviews/database.
action_for_sprint_a_plus: Replace SITE_CONFIG.aggregateRating static 4.9/112 with DB query via getAggregateRating() helper. Add these 4 platform URLs as C6 evidence_slugs in SSOT narrative_claimmap.
